revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:従一位]][[ko:종1위]][[zh:從一位]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:従一位]][[ko:종1위]][[zh:從一位]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:従一位]][[ko:종1위]][[zh:從一位]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:従一位]][[ko:종1위]][[zh:從一位]]
'''Jūichii''' ({{ill|Jūichii|ja|従一位|1=Junior First Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūichii|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior First Rank|qq=}}) is one of the Ranks in Japan's [[Ritsuryō]]-based hierarchy and [[Shinkai (divine rank)|Shinkai (divine Ranks)]]. It is positioned below ''{{ill|Senior First Rank|ja|正一位|1=Senior First Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior First Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior First Rank|qq=}}'' and above ''{{ill|Senior Second Rank|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Second Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Second Rank|qq=}}''.<ref>https://www.wakapoetry.net/background/society/court-offices-titles-and-Ranks/court-Ranks/</ref>
== Overview == Under the [[Ritsuryō]] system, ''Jūichii'' was the highest Rank bestowed upon queens or women of ministerial status. Many holders of the office of ''{{ill|Daijō-daijin|en|Daijō-daijin|qid=Q1157586|lt=Daijō Daijin|1=Daijō-daijin}}'' (equivalent to Senior Prime Minister) or ''{{ill|Kampaku|ja|関白|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kampaku|1=kampaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1199966}}'' (imperial regent), which were typically not included in the Rank sequence, were conferred ''Jūichii''. Over time, it became a customary Rank for senior court officials from families below ministerial level, such as those of the ''{{ill|Kugyō|1=Kugyō|2=ja|3=公卿|ja|Kugyō|1=Kugyō|2=ja|3=公卿|1=Kugyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kugyō|13=User:Immanuelle/Kugyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q3138036}}'' (noble families).
In the {{ill|Edo period|en|Edo period|qid=Q184963|lt=Edo period|1=Edo period}}, ''Jūichii'' was often granted to ''{{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=Shōgun|1=Shogun}}'' who retired to become ''{{ill|Ōgosho|ja|大御所|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōgosho|1=ōgosho|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q5366647}}'' and subsequently appointed as ''Daijō Daijin''. It was also conferred on mothers of shoguns, such as ''{{ill|Oeyo|en|Oeyo|qid=Q1325288|lt=Sūgen’in|1=Oeyo}}'' and ''{{ill|Keishō’in|ja|桂昌院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keishō’in|1=Keishōin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q5369704}}''. Keishō’in, upon receiving ''Jūichii'', was affectionately referred to as ''Ichii-sama'' (Her Ladyship of First Rank).
In the {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}}, ''Jūichii'' was more widely conferred than during the Edo period. It corresponded to the first Rank for [[kazoku|dukes]], and others of lower titles could also attain it later in life. The Rank was granted in an audience with the {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan|1=Emperor of Japan}}.
While Ranks above ''Jūichii'' such as ''Shōichii'' were rare after the {{ill|Kamakura period|en|Kamakura period|qid=Q236205|lt=Kamakura period|1=Kamakura period}}, notable exceptions include ''{{ill|Sanjō Sanetomi|en|Sanjō Sanetomi|qid=Q516646|lt=Sanetomi Sanjō|1=Sanjō Sanetomi}}'', who received ''Shōichii'' during his lifetime, and ''{{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|qid=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga|1=Oda Nobunaga}}'', who was posthumously awarded ''Shōichii'' in 1917.
Since 1916, following the conferment to ''{{ill|Takatsukasa Hirotsune|ja|鷹司熙通|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takatsukasa Hirotsune|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 鷹司煕通|1=Takatsukasa Hiromichi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q221969}}'', ''Jūichii'' has generally been awarded posthumously. It corresponds to the Rank for those awarded the ''{{ill|Grand Cordon of the Order of the Chrysanthemum|ja|大勲位菊花大綬章|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Grand Cordon of the Order of the Chrysanthemum|1=Grand Cordon of the Supreme Order of the Chrysanthemum|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q5361043}}''.
=== Notable Recipients of ''Jūichii'' === The dates listed correspond to the conferment (until December 2, 1872, based on the {{ill|en:Lunisolar calendar|en|en:Lunisolar calendar|qid=Q194235|lt=en:Lunisolar calendar|1=Lunisolar calendar}}) or posthumous granting of Rank.
==== Ancient and Medieval Period ==== {{columns-list|2| * {{ill|Isonokami no Maro|en|Isonokami no Maro|qid=Q6086140|lt=Ishikami Maro|1=Isonokami no Maro}} (717) * {{ill|Tachibana no Moroe|en|Tachibana no Moroe|qid=Q3135863|lt=Tachibana no Moroe|1=Tachibana no Moroe}} (743) * {{ill|Fujiwara no Nakamaro|en|Fujiwara no Nakamaro|qid=Q540305|lt=Fujiwara no Nakamaro|1=Fujiwara no Nakamaro}} (760) * {{ill|Fujiwara no Toyonari|en|Fujiwara no Toyonari|qid=Q3090678|lt=Fujiwara no Toyonari|1=Fujiwara no Toyonari}} (764) * {{ill|Fujiwara no Nagate|en|Fujiwara no Nagate|qid=Q11623368|lt=Fujiwara no Nagate|1=Fujiwara no Nagate}} (769) }}
==== Modern Period ==== {{columns-list|2| * {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|en|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|qid=Q287657|lt=Tokugawa Yoshinobu|1=Tokugawa Yoshinobu}} (1888) * {{ill|Matsukata Masayoshi|en|Matsukata Masayoshi|qid=Q714039|lt=Matsukata Masayoshi|1=Matsukata Masayoshi}} (1924) * {{ill|Itō Hirobumi|en|Itō Hirobumi|qid=Q174971|lt=Itō Hirobumi|1=Itō Hirobumi}} (1909) * {{ill|Sanjō Sanetomi|en|Sanjō Sanetomi|qid=Q516646|lt=Sanjō Sanetomi|1=Sanjō Sanetomi}} (1868) * {{ill|Oeyo|en|Oeyo|qid=Q1325288|lt=Satsuma Yoshiko|1=Oeyo}} (1626) }}
==== Post-War Japan ==== Posthumous awards have become customary, with rare exceptions like [[:en:Suzuki Kantarō|Suzuki Kantarō]], who was conferred the Rank 12 years after his death.
{| class="wikitable" ! Name !! Roles !! Date of Conferment !! Notes |- | {{ill|Makino Nobuaki|en|Makino Nobuaki|qid=Q920993|lt=Makino Nobuaki|1=Makino Nobuaki}} || {{ill|Minister of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|ja|外務大臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minister of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Foreign minister|qid=Q7330070}}, {{ill|Agriculture and Commerce Minister|ja|農商務大臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Agriculture and Commerce Minister|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 農商務省 (日本)|1=Ministry of Agriculture and Commerce|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q3315480}} || 1949 || Upgraded from ''Shōnii'' |- | {{ill|Shigeru Yoshida|en|Shigeru Yoshida|qid=Q301804|lt=Yoshida Shigeru|1=Shigeru Yoshida}} || {{ill|Prime Minister of Japan|1=Prime Minister of Japan|2=ja|3=内閣総理大臣|ja|Prime Minister of Japan|1=Prime Minister of Japan|2=ja|3=内閣総理大臣|1=Prime Minister of Japan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prime Minister of Japan|13=User:Immanuelle/Prime Minister of Japan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q274948}} || 1967 || Awarded posthumously |- | {{ill|Shinzo Abe|en|Shinzo Abe|qid=Q132345|lt=Abe Shinzō|1=Shinzo Abe}} || Prime Minister || 2022 || Awarded posthumously |}

Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Second Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Senior Third Rank|ja|正三位|1=Senior Third Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Third Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Third Rank|qq=}} Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank|ja|正五位|1=Senior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank|ja|従五位|1=Junior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank|ja|正六位|1=Senior Sixth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Sixth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Sixth Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Senior Seventh Rank|ja|正七位|1=Senior Seventh Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Seventh Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Seventh Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Junior Seventh Rank|ja|従七位|1=Junior Seventh Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Seventh Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Seventh Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Senior Eighth Rank|ja|正八位|1=Senior Eighth
